name: threatlocker-mcp
description: Query and manage ThreatLocker endpoint application-control data — computers, groups, approval requests, and audit logs — for MSP security AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to automate ThreatLocker Portal operations. List and filter computers and computer groups by organization; retrieve and act on software approval requests (approve/deny); search the audit log for blocked application events; and manage organizations (MSP child tenants). Supports scoping to a specific managed organization via the optional THREATLOCKER_ORGANIZATION_ID config, or acting as the primary org by default.

threatlocker_api_key.title: ThreatLocker API Key
threatlocker_api_key.description: Your ThreatLocker Portal API key (Portal -> Administrators -> API Users). Sent as the Authorization header value with no Bearer prefix.

threatlocker_organization_id.title: Managed Organization ID (optional)
threatlocker_organization_id.description: Optional. The GUID of a managed/child organization to scope every request to. Leave blank to act as the API user's primary org. Sent as the managedOrganizationId header.

threatlocker_base_url.title: Portal API base URL
threatlocker_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://portalapi.g.threatlocker.com/portalapi). Only set for non-default shards (e.g. https://portalapi.eu.threatlocker.com/portalapi). Locate your region at https://threatlocker.kb.help/locating-your-organizations-instance/
